title: Sazo & Phagul
desc: The spring-arrival ritual cycle. Palanquins of village gods are laid open, temple doors closed — the deities departing for a short rest while villagers clean and polish temple floors.

title: Raulane Festival
desc: At Kalpa's Santang deity temple, men dressed as Sauni spirits in red gacchi masks dance ritualistic forms to seek blessings for prosperity. Dates shift with the local tantric calendar.

title: National Tribal Festival
desc: Kinnaur's most outsider-accessible cultural showcase — folk dances, intricate wood carvings, woven textiles, and tribal handicrafts from across the district.
